name: 7'x10' Moroccan Shag Tufted Area Rug Cream - Threshold™: Geometric Wool, Handwoven, Medium Pile, Indoor Rectangle Rug
description:
Add soft comfort to your living space with this Moroccan Shag Tufted Area Rug from Threshold™. Featuring an allover Moroccan pattern in a neutral hue, this decorative tufted rug brings a combination of simple comfort and timeless style to your existing decor. This rectangular area rug is crafted from 100% jute in a tufted construction to provide soft underfoot comfort. A must-have addition to your decor, this jute rug features a medium-pile construction, making it highly versatile and easy to place in your living room, hallway, study and more.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
